一个平平无奇美术生，穿越成老祖宗苏东坡早夭幼子苏遁，掐指一算——
老爹去惠州吃荔枝时，自己11岁
老爹去海南岛吃蛤蜊，自己14岁
老爹获赦后病逝常州，自己17岁
蔡京立“元祐党人碑”，自己19岁
好家伙，搁着自己倒血霉了？
老祖宗成了自己的负资产了？
如何破局？
讨好铁血皇帝宋哲宗？
别想了，这小子亲政后，第一个贬的就是“老师”苏东坡！
要不，还是猥琐发育，从小调教艺术家皇帝宋徽宗吧？
不是，男扮女装的李清照，又是从哪儿冒出来的？
主角偶像伟人，三观正，认真学习、生活、成长
不向封建社会妥协，不做家天下帝王，继承者为义子岳飞
如果穿越古代，只为了当皇帝收美女，新中国先烈的努力就是个笑话
标题无厘头，小说很严谨
每章必查史书，真实书写历史的某一种可能
真正的历史爱好者，绝对不会失望
少年时期主打亲情、友情，成年后才会有爱情
男频，成长和发展是主线
爱情只是人生的一部分，不是主线","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6ab54ec8c9d218c317eabdba07235101~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"文卿如","author_id":"","book_id":"7514957086589979710","book_name":"老爹苏东坡老婆李清照老铁宋徽宗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5046人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514969209651069502","read_count":"5046","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"755971"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"260","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,单女主,宋朝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6ab54ec8c9d218c317eabdba07235101~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448675&x-signature=wtfc7o04xQDaAJb%2BPEJkz1Mfivg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98534644409","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"87"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231917557E6499642E2675B7E476"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded
